title: The Expedition against the Bane Libyan
description: According to Abu Ja'far (al-Tabari]: The Messenger of God set out [ 1501(during Jumada 1180 at the end of six months from the conquest of the Banu QurayTah to the Banu Libyan, seeking [vengeance] for the men [who were betrayed ] at al-Raji', Khubayb b. 'Adi and his companions. 18 1 To take the enemy by surprise, he pretended to be setting out for the north. 182 He left Medina and traveled by Ghurab, a mountain near Medina, on his way north, then by Makhid183 and al-Batra '.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
